IT BITES!
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2002 at 6:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254556949
32 posts
THIS SWORD STINKIES! its got a horrible delay! now a days its all down to delay delay delay! and anyways there is a much better selection than this for sk/pally/war. like darkblood sword, and a few others. id lay of this wep cuz its 2hs. needless to say i was dissapointed when my pally got it!

▲ Page top
I'd go with Abram's
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2002 at 6:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361674561
37 posts
I see at least one auction everytime i go to EC for an abram's axe of the stoic. Sometimes as low as 1k and thats a nice 30/46 weapon with nice stats and an invigor proc.
▲ Page top
you sould see this in action!
QuoteReply
# Nov 16 2001 at 10:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249395162
97 posts
ok haveing one my self i know how sweet this sword is. here it is for ya (some little stats)
level 35 paladin, 121 str,2hs/1hs/bash/double attack all maxed for level= i can hit for high 80's low 90's with this. if i were to switch one of my items my max hit would be for 95. i've doubled for 88 with this and i just owned the mob.
now the major thing that sucks is the dly but at 35 i'm getting an 11 dmg bonus so its good to me. this is more of a group type weapon/support tank weapon then a solo/main tank weapon becuase of the dly. now paladins don't have to worry, once you get flash of light you can keep that aggro for a very long time. they should have really made this weapon with some kicking graficts but o well it will always kick butt till the EPIC comes along.

Grothlamarath Malarath 35th human Paladin
The Nameless
▲ Page top
RE: you sould see this in action!
QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2001 at 3:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763564101
49 posts
25/50 is all well and good but if im goin to have 50 dly id rather have a runed frost blade which is 34/49 with 75 hps and 15 svc for roughly 1500pp
save a lil more and when you lvl 40 you'll be doing hits for 130

/shout is it safe?
▲ Page top

very nice sword
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2001 at 4:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249103735
1 post
lol i got given this sword at lvl 1 by a very nice warrior,now im lvl 17 still got it but dont use it as much.
▲ Page top
RE: very nice sword
QuoteReply
# Nov 14 2001 at 8:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248526746
29 posts
At lvl 17 you have a damage cap on your weapon of 14, effectively leaving you with a 14/50 weapon. This means that even with 200 str you won´t be able to hit for more than around 32 or so.

At level 20 the dmg cap is raised to 24 (Not sure about that number tho) and you´ll be able to get a whole lot more out of this weapon by then. Point being: Keep it! :-)
▲ Page top
RE: very nice sword
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2001 at 9:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763997532
105 posts
your close, but after lvl 20 there is no more damage cap, if you had a 50/150 weapon (theoretical weapon) it would still be a 50/150 weapon, not a 24(?)/150.
▲ Page top
RE: very nice sword
QuoteReply
# May 02 2003 at 4:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759189111
22 posts
Those are the stats on the weighted axe I think.. at high levels the damage bonus on that is like 90.. making it a fun weapon for a drop in a newbie zone.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 06 2001 at 11:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) 13 WTF?? how do i up date that LOL
GOOD DEAL?
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2001 at 11:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757350491
2 posts
I got this sword for 175pp yesterday did i get a good deal?

Also sure the delay makes this sword less than uber but at my level 51 damage a swing is pretty good. Also what level does double attack work consistantly?

21 Paladin
Xaiver <Dreams of The Fallen>
Xev
▲ Page top
RE: GOOD DEAL?
QuoteReply
# Nov 14 2001 at 8:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248526746
29 posts
150 is a magical number (or a soft cap, depending how you look at it :-) in EQ.

When your dual wield hits 150 you´ll dual wield a whole lot more than at skill level 149.

When your channelling skill hits 150 you´ll acutally be able to regain concentration if you take a few hits while casting.

Same goes for double attack. So remember: 150 :-)
▲ Page top
RE: GOOD DEAL?
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2001 at 9:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249693043
23 posts
you got a good deal... not great but good :) anyway double attack will work consistantly when you get it maxed out for your lvl for you I think 110 is maxed ... it willl work alot but not all the time I am also a lvl 21pally I recently got my ghoulbane so I use that now :)hope I helped seeya

Executioners axe is Warrior only so shaddup!
▲ Page top
RE: Crappy
QuoteReply
# May 25 2001 at 2:05 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591759356340
15 posts
Uh yeah, but is the Exe Axe warior only?

If you're not a warrior (hello Paladin here) this is a fairly awesome damage dealer. It's nice to be able to hit for 80 and then double attack consistently for 140+. Use it and you couldn't pry it out of my cold dead hand without offering something better. Sure does make taunting MoBs of the main tank for a few seconds a heck of a lot easier

Definately not crap. Well, except to uber-twinks.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 02 2001 at 12:15 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Bah...
RE: Crappy
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2001 at 4:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361411506
Sage
89 posts
Ok, I'll give it to you, for the level you need to be to get it, it does suck. But let's think for a min. Aside from planar gear (which your grouped for anyways), when someone gets a weapon like this, they sell to a lower level so they can buy something better. It does suck compared to other things out there (Noctavelant blade, I know I spelled that wrong), but your comparing it to things of higher levels. Next to my corrupted ghoulbane, almost everything sucks, but hey, I get it, I give/sell to a lower level. So stop putting down weapons and realize there is a use for all of them.
▲ Page top
RE: Crappy
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 8:14 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Funny how some people don't understand about fitting the weapon to the situation instead of the reverse.

A Mace of Shadowed Souls is effective when you need to beat the daylights out of a critter that can cast, doesn't have a damage shield, and isn't packing a thousand or so hitpoints - much less anything that has a riposte back for more that you hit for. You pull out the heavy two-handed weapons for beating on on those things that hit for 100+ and where 60 hp is maybe half a percent of its hp - especially when your facing things that hit VERY fast when you have riposte and can return a 20 point hit for a 90 point one.
▲ Page top
Nice Sword
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2001 at 10:01 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous

Xyko (Barbarian Warrior)
Prexus Server
